title: hieracium arolae subsp. rhoeadifolioides
intro: Hieracium arolae subsp. rhoeadifolioides, also known as hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium arolae subsp. rhoeadifolioides include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
